mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, type, parent_id, icon, sort_order, is_deleted, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM category WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT FROM category WHERE (user_id IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) AND is_deleted = 0 AND id NOT IN (SELECT ref_id FROM user_data_hide WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND data_type = 'category') ORDER BY type ASC, user_id IS NOT NULL, sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT FROM category WHERE (user_id IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) AND is_deleted = 0 AND id NOT IN (SELECT ref_id FROM user_data_hide WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND data_type = 'category') AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.name, c.type, c.parent_id, c.icon, c.sort_order, c.is_deleted, c.created_at, MAX(t.created_at) as last_used FROM category c INNER JOIN entry e ON e.account_id = c.id AND e.account_type = 'category' INNER JOIN `transaction` t ON t.id = e.transaction_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.user_id, c.name, c.type, c.parent_id, c.icon, c.sort_order, c.is_deleted, c.created_at ORDER BY last_used DESC LIMIT #{limit}
